user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Sony
Product type: PlayStation 5 Pro gaming console
Tone: innovative, dynamic, premium
Visual style: Futuristic and sleek design with bold contrasts and vibrant lighting to emphasize cutting-edge technology and immersive gaming experience.
Conceptual technique: high-energy experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Level Up Reality.
brief.caption: A high-energy scene where a gamer is surrounded by a 360-degree holographic display of a virtual world, with the PS5 Pro console glowing futuristic blue on the desk, casting dynamic shadows across the room.
brief.visual_style: Futuristic and sleek design with bold contrasts and vibrant lighting to emphasize cutting-edge technology and immersive gaming experience.
brief.call_to_action: Experience the Next Dimension with PS5 Pro
brief.typography_style: Futuristic sans-serif with a metallic finish, conveying speed and modernity
brief.color_scheme: electric blue, jet black, and silver accents
